title: Dialog System State Machine
description: Interactive Mermaid state diagram showing how a task-oriented dialog system manages conversation flow through states and transitions for a flight booking task.
creator: Dan McCreary
author: Dan McCreary
subject: Conversational AI

learningObjectives: Identify the states and transitions in a task-oriented dialog system
Trace how slot-filling drives the flow of a flight-booking conversation
educational.prerequisites: Basic understanding of chatbots and intents
